name: Security or privacy report
about: Report a security, privacy, secret, plugin permission, or public-data concern
title: "[Security/Privacy]: "
labels: security, privacy
assignees: ""
---

## Before You Post

If this report contains an actual secret, private data, private path, raw data,
or exploit detail, do not post the sensitive value publicly. Provide a redacted
summary and ask for private disclosure handling.

## Summary

Describe the concern without exposing secrets or private data.

## Expected Behavior

What safety or privacy boundary should hold?

## Actual Behavior

What appears unsafe or confusing?

## Reproduction Steps

1.
2.
3.

Use public-safe reproduction steps whenever possible.

## Environment

- TuringResearch Plus version:
- OS:
- Python version:
- Live mode enabled: yes / no
- Plugins enabled: yes / no
- Network access involved: yes / no

## Data Sensitivity

- Data involved: public demo / public data / private data / secret / restricted data / unknown
- Does this involve an API key or token? yes / no
- Does this involve raw data? yes / no
- Does this involve SMPL-X or restricted model files? yes / no
- Does this involve private local paths? yes / no
- Does this involve plugin permissions? yes / no

## Screenshots / Logs Optional

Attach only redacted public-safe screenshots or logs.

## Safety / No Secrets Warning

- Do not upload API keys, tokens, `.env` files, or credentials.
- Do not upload raw data.
- Do not upload SMPL-X model files or other restricted model payloads.
- Do not upload private local paths.
- Do not paste full exploit payloads if they expose users.

## Checklist

- [ ] I redacted secrets and private paths.
- [ ] I did not upload raw data.
- [ ] I did not upload restricted model files.
- [ ] I described whether live mode was enabled.
- [ ] I described whether plugin permissions were involved.
